Sampling distractors at random from C ONCEPT - NET is a bad solution, as such distractors are easy to eliminate using simple surface clues. To remedy this, we propose to create ques- tion sets : for each question concept q and relation r we group three different triplets {(q, r, a1), (q, r, a2), (q, r, a3)} (see Figure…
